name: lazyscriptex-compiler
description: Direct native x64 LazyScriptEX compiler with clear LSG front-end naming, OpenGL/Vulkan parity, LSSL GLSL/SPIR-V shaders, plug-and-play ray scenes, Vulkan-backed LazyUI, inferred objects and tables, circular module graphs, LSHTML/LSCSS, native bindings, O0-O6 optimization, fused SIMD loops, persistent worker pools, runtime workload selection, and optional generated LSSL compute workloads.

scripts.test: node test.js && node test_frontend_names.js && node test_optimizer_licm.js && node test_optimizer_near_c.js && node test_kernel_accelerator.js
